name: Blueberry Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Cream cheese (2 tubs, 8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix ingredients well and line a 9-inch pie pan.
3. Bake for 6 minutes.
4. Blend until smooth the cream cheese, sour cream, and sugar.
5. Pour into pie shell.
6. Top with blueberries.
7. Sprinkle sugar on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 5 minutes.
9. Chill and serve.
